meta.title: Artificial Intelligence In The  Military & Other Top Stories From The Week
meta.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 

It's Saturday 29 August 2020.  Stay up to date on what's happening in the military with Sandboxx News. 

Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

AI WINS FLAWLESS VICTORY AGAINST HUMAN FIGHTER PILOT IN DARPA DOGFIGHT
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3aG5olZ

RQ-170: THE AIR FORCE’S SECRET ‘BEAST OF KANDAHAR’
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/31FYrx6

WOMEN IN THE MILITARY: PAVING THE WAY AND SHOOTING FOR THE STARS…LITERALLY
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2Yr6Ymz

‘MISSILE BARGES’ COULD BE AMERICA’S SECRET WEAPON IN THE PACIFIC
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2E4rpip

THE SECRET TO FIGHTER PILOT MORALE IS APPARENTLY CHICK-FIL-A SAUCE
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3j3MxnI

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

#fighterpilot #usnavy #artificialintelligence #womeninthemilitary

0:00 Intro
0:44 AI VS Human Fighter Pilot in Darpa Dogfight
2:23 The Air Force's Secret 'Beast of Kandahar'
3:20 Women in the Military
4:14 Missile Barges in the Pacific 
5:54 The Secret to Fighter Pilot Morale
